channel.title: pavelzw's blog
channel.description: My personal blog about software development and other stuff.

item.title: Deploying JetBrains Gateway in a corporate world
item.description: Deploying stuff in a corporate environment can sometimes be challenging due to proxies or firewalls. This article describes how I deployed JetBrains Gateway in a corporate environment with no internet access.
item.author: pavelzw@gmail.com (Pavel Zwerschke)
